name: OB-5 CRM SYNC · Workpex + Custom CRM (dual push)

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ {
  "source": $('Webhook').item.json.body.source || "instagram_in",
  "name": $('Webhook').item.json.body.name,
  "ig_username": $('Webhook').item.json.body.handle || $('Webhook').item.json.body.ig_username,
  "phone": $('Normalize for CRM').item.json.phone,
  "destination": $('Webhook').item.json.body.destination,
  "travel_date": $('Webhook').item.json.body.travel_date,
  "travelers": $('Normalize for CRM').item.json.members,
  "budget": $('Normalize for CRM').item.json.travel_budget,
  "quick_assistance": $('Webhook').item.json.body.quick_assistance,
  "status": $('Webhook').item.json.body.status,
  "notes": $('Webhook').item.json.body.notes,
  "ig_user_id": $('Webhook').item.json.body.ig_user_id
} }}
